_meta.status: DRAFT - needs native speaker review before production use

topbar.noteTip: Quick study notes likh lein, phir unhe kisi AI mein copy karke aur seekhein
topbar.reportAria: Bug report karein ya feature suggest karein
topbar.reportTip: Koi bug mila ya koi idea hai? Seedha developer ko report bhejein
topbar.helpTip: Yeh screen kya karti hai, kaise use karein, aur kyun kaam ki hai
nav.drawer.revision.label: Revision
nav.drawer.revision.tip: Aaj revision ke liye jo kuch due hai uska printable high-yield digest, saath mein aapki saved Crib Sheets.
nav.drawer.library.label: Library
nav.drawer.library.tip: Team ke curate kiye hue question banks browse aur import karein.
nav.drawer.bookmarks.label: Bookmarks
nav.drawer.bookmarks.tip: Aapka har saved question, topic ke hisaab se grouped, dobara padhne ya retest ke liye ready.
nav.drawer.mistakeVault.label: Mistake Vault
nav.drawer.mistakeVault.sub: Jo galat hua use theek karein
nav.drawer.mistakeVault.tip: Har woh question jo aapne galat kiya, tab tak saved rahega jab tak aap use lagataar do baar sahi na kar lein.
nav.drawer.doubts.label: My Doubts
nav.drawer.doubts.sub: Jo points aapne dobara dekhne ke liye flag kiye
nav.drawer.doubts.tip: Jo concept points aur explanations aapko unclear lagi aur flag ki, unhe yahan resolve karein.
nav.drawer.addq.label: Question add karein
nav.drawer.addq.tip: Students jo question sets practise karte hain unhe upload karein aur likhein.
nav.drawer.ikigai.label: Ikigai Compass
nav.drawer.ikigai.tip: Aapka living 4-circle readiness map. Passion, Profession, Mission aur Vocation aapki practice ke saath saath badalte rehte hain.
nav.drawer.stats.label: Stats
nav.drawer.stats.tip: Accuracy, streaks aur progress, har topic ke hisaab se alag alag.
nav.drawer.leaderboard.label: Leaderboard
nav.drawer.leaderboard.tip: Dekhein aapka week doosre aspirants ke muqaable kaisa raha.
nav.drawer.weightage.label: Exam weightage
nav.drawer.weightage.sub: Exam mein sabse zyada kya poochha jaata hai
nav.drawer.weightage.tip: Har subject ke kitne marks hain. Wahin padhein jahan marks hain.
nav.drawer.activityLog.label: History
nav.drawer.activityLog.tip: Aapke level-ups, streak milestones, mastery moments aur test attempts ki newest-first timeline.
nav.drawer.search.label: Search
nav.drawer.search.tip: Ek hi search mein practice questions, concept cards, lab values, dosage drills aur FAQs.
nav.drawer.studyPlan.label: Study plan
nav.drawer.studyPlan.tip: Apni NORCET date aur daily goal set karein, aur exam day tak ka personalised day-by-day plan paayein.
nav.drawer.reference.label: Reference
nav.drawer.reference.tip: Lab values, drug tables aur quick-look clinical numbers.
nav.drawer.premium.label: Premium
nav.drawer.premium.tip: Dekhein Premium mein kya kya milega. Test phase ke dauraan sab kuch free hai.
nav.drawer.studyMethods.label: Study Methods
nav.drawer.studyMethods.tip: Evidence-based techniques: active recall, spaced repetition aur is app ko achhe se use karne ka tareeka.
nav.drawer.faq.label: FAQ
nav.drawer.faq.sub: Hamari team ke jawab diye sawaal
nav.drawer.faq.tip: Common sawaalon ke jawab team ne diye hain, apna sawaal bhi poochh sakte hain.
nav.drawer.about.label: About
nav.drawer.about.tip: Hamara mission, app kaise sikhaata hai, aur ise banane wala insaan.
nav.drawer.sendFeedback.label: Feedback bhejein
nav.drawer.sendFeedback.sub: Bug report karein ya feature suggest karein
nav.drawer.sendFeedback.tip: Koi bug mila ya koi idea hai? Seedha developer ko report bhejein.
nav.drawer.myReports.label: My feedback
nav.drawer.myReports.sub: Aapki reports aur admin ke replies
nav.drawer.myReports.tip: Aapki purani reports aur admin ke replies.
nav.drawer.settingsTip: Themes, sounds, gestures, reminders, backup aur aapki profile.
quiz.empty.bookmarks: Abhi aapke paas koi bookmarked question nahi hai, practice ke dauraan kuch bookmark karein, phir wapas aayein.
quiz.empty.reviewDue: Abhi review ke liye kuch due nahi hai, kal wapas aayein.
quiz.empty.wrong: Review karne ke liye koi galat jawab nahi hai.
quiz.empty.generic: Yahan dikhane ke liye kuch nahi hai.
quiz.coinsTip: Accuracy Coins, sirf guess karne se nahi, 'why' ko samajhne se milte hain
quiz.timerRemainingTip: Bacha hua time: aakhri seconds mein chip pulse karti hai
quiz.timerElapsedTip: Is session mein ab tak ka time
quiz.whyBonusBody: Aapne mark bhi paaya aur ruk kar 'why' bhi samjha. Yehi asli clinical instinct hai.
quiz.bookmarkedTip: Bookmarked: hataane ke liye tap karein
quiz.bookmarkTip: Is question ko baad mein review ke liye Bookmarks mein save karein
quiz.revealedBanner: Solution dikha diya gaya: yeh wala neutral rahega, aapki accuracy par iska koi asar nahi hoga. Hum ise aapki review queue mein wapas laayenge taaki aap ise pakka yaad kar lein.
quiz.flagTip: Flag kiye questions My Doubts mein save hote hain, sidebar mein milenge.
quiz.flagged: Flagged: explanation unclear hai (unflag ke liye tap karein)
quiz.flagCta: Abhi bhi confusion hai? Is explanation ko flag karein
quiz.reportErrorCta: Koi galti dikhi? Report karein, har report ek insaan check karta hai.
home.caughtUpSub: Aaj review ke liye kuch due nahi hai
home.menuTip: App ka har section, study, progress, tools, learning aur help, bas ek swipe ya tap door. Home par kahin bhi left swipe karke kholein.
home.todayTip: Aapki daily briefing, aaj revision mein kya due hai, reminders, naye achievements aur study insights.
home.settingsTip: Account, themes, reminders, notifications, sound, sidebar gestures, backups aur bahut kuch.
home.guestTitle: Aap guest ke roop mein explore kar rahe hain
home.guestBody: Progress save karne, devices ke beech sync karne, aur leaderboard & library unlock karne ke liye sign in karein.
home.waitlistBody: Waitlist par apni founding-member seat reserve karein, shuruaati batches ko sab kuch free milega.
home.streakSavedBody: Kal aapka din miss ho gaya tha: aapke grace day ne use cover kar liya. Streak zinda rakhne ke liye aaj thoda practice kar lo.
home.whatsNewOne: "{name}" v{version} par update hua: dekhne ke liye tap karein
home.whatsNewMany: {n} banks update huye: dekhne ke liye tap karein
home.weakAreaTip: Woh topic jahan abhi aapki accuracy sabse kam hai. Apne saare weak topics drill karne ke liye tap karein, jo questions galat huye woh pehle aayenge.
home.syllabusCoverageTip: Poore syllabus ka kitna hissa aapne chhua hai. Topic-by-topic breakdown ke liye tap karein, kya start hua, kya master ho gaya, aur kya abhi baaki hai.
home.stats.graceTitle: Ek din miss karna allowed hai
home.stats.question: question
home.week.title: Aapka week · {range}
home.week.keepGoing: Lage raho: weekly summary unlock karne ke liye har din kuch questions solve kar lo.
home.review.confirmBodyOne: Spaced revision ke liye 1 question due hai. Har jawab par turant feedback milega.
home.review.confirmBodyMany: Spaced revision ke liye {n} questions due hain. Har jawab par turant feedback milega.
home.exam.setNewDate: Nayi date set karne ke liye tap karein
home.drill.title: Drill Tests
home.drill.tip: Aapke saare test modes ek jagah. Quick, Topic Wise, Mock, Dosage aur Advanced, saath mein previous-year papers.
home.drill.sub: Quick · Topic Wise · Mock · Advanced · Dosage · PYQ
home.learn.title: Topic wise seekhein
home.learn.tip: Concept cards jo har topic sikhaate hain, test dene se pehle material seekh lein.
home.learn.sub: Concept cards · test se pehle seekhein
home.levelUp.title: Level Up
home.levelUp.tip: Aapka progression hub, clinical games aur Knowledge Map khel kar XP kamayein, levels chadhein aur prestige tiers unlock karein.
home.levelUp.sub: Clinical games · Knowledge Map · XP kamayein
home.notif.reviewTitle: Questions review ke liye ready hain
home.notif.reviewBodyOne: Aaj spaced revision ke liye 1 question due hai.
home.notif.reviewBodyMany: Aaj spaced revision ke liye {n} questions due hain.
home.notif.streakBody: Aapne lagataar {s} din padhaai ki hai. Yehi consistency pass hone walon ko baaki sab se alag karti hai.
home.notif.exam7: Final stretch: apni prep par bharosa rakhein aur high-yield notes paas rakhein.
home.notif.exam14: Do hafte baaki. Apne weak areas ko tight karein aur revision par zor dein.
home.notif.exam30: Ek mahine se kam bacha hai. Ab steady, focused revision hi sabse zyada kaam aayegi.
home.notif.trendingUpBody: Aapki accuracy week over week {lastAcc}% se badhkar {thisAcc}% ho gayi. Aapne jo bhi badla, woh kaam kar raha hai.
home.notif.sharperBody: Pichhle week ke muqaable aapki {topic} accuracy kaafi behtar hui hai. Badhiya momentum hai.
home.notif.bankUpdatedMany: {n} question banks mein naya content aaya hai.
home.reply.fixed: Aapki report fix ho gayi: shukriya!
home.reply.fixedOn: {id} par aapki report fix ho gayi: shukriya!
home.reply.one: Ek admin ne aapke feedback ka reply diya hai.
home.reply.many: Admin ne aapki {n} reports ka jawab diya hai.
welcome.pitch.title: Aapka NORCET edge
welcome.pitch.sub: 60 seconds mein: yeh ek aur PDF se behtar kyun hai.
welcome.pitch.p1Title: Zyaadatar aspirants PDFs mein doob jaate hain
welcome.pitch.p1Body: Endless notes, par pata hi nahi ki asal mein kahan khade hain ya aage kya theek karna hai.
welcome.pitch.p2Title: Yeh app prep ko deliberate banaata hai
welcome.pitch.p2Body: Spaced revision, weak-area targeting, real exam-style timing aur aapke syllabus ka clear map.
welcome.pitch.p3Title: Exam day jaisa feel dene ke liye bana hai
welcome.pitch.p3Body: Negative marking, sectional pacing aur topper benchmarks, taaki asli CBT jaana-pehchaana lage.
welcome.lib.title: Library se shuru karein
welcome.lib.sub: Kabhi bhi sidebar menu mein mil jaayegi.
welcome.lib.r1Body: Topic aur source ke hisaab se grouped curated question sets, aapke practice pool ka dil.
welcome.lib.r2Title: Jo sets chahiye woh download karein
welcome.lib.r2Body: Bank add karein aur uske questions aapke tests, stats aur revision mein jud jaate hain, baad mein offline bhi chalte hain.
welcome.lib.r3Body: Custom question sets banayein (Add question / Library) aur exactly wahi drill karein jo aapko chahiye.
welcome.demo.genderTrust: AIIMS strict 80:20 gender quota lagaata hai. Hum ise sirf aapke pool mein aapka simulated leaderboard rank calibrate karne ke liye use karte hain. Content limit karne ke liye kabhi nahi.
welcome.demo.qualTrust: Isse hum aapki training ke examples aapke hisaab se frame karte hain. GNM nurses ko bedside-to-theory drills milti hain.
welcome.demo.empTitle: Prep aapke din mein kaise fit hoti hai?
welcome.demo.empTrust: Hum aapka dashboard adapt karte hain. Ek working nurse Tuesday dopahar ko 3-ghante ka mock nahi de sakti.
welcome.demo.windowTitle: Aap kab sabse achha padhte hain?
welcome.demo.windowTrust: Hum aapka daily nudge isi window par bhejenge, jo reminder tab aaye jab aap sach mein free hon, wahi kaam karta hai. Kabhi bhi badal sakte hain.
welcome.demo.privacyNote: Optional & private · kabhi bhi Settings → Profile mein badlein.
welcome.demo.contentNote: Har question insaano ne likha aur check kiya hai. Galti dikhe? Ek tap mein report karein.
welcome.ikigai.title: Aapka reason why kya hai?
welcome.ikigai.bodyPost: : woh gehri wajah jiske liye aap Nursing Officer banna chahte hain. Kya cheez yeh sab worth it banaati hai?
welcome.ikigai.placeholder: Apne parents ke liye ghar khareedna. Khud ko prove karna. Apni community ki seva karna.
welcome.ikigai.private: Private. Ise sirf aap hi dekh paayenge.
welcome.ikigai.return: Aapke sabse mushkil dinon mein, NurseHolic yeh baat aapko wapas yaad dilaayega, aapke apne shabdon mein.
welcome.tips.title: Teen quick tips
welcome.tips.sub: Chhoti chhoti cheezein jo app ko aapka banaati hain.
welcome.tips.t1Title: Kisi bhi card ko press & hold karein
welcome.tips.t1Body: Home screen, menu ya settings mein, kisi card ko thodi der press & hold karein aur bina khole uska quick description dekh lein.
welcome.tips.t2Title: Menu kholne ke liye swipe karein
welcome.tips.t2Body: Home screen par kahin se bhi left swipe karke menu kholein, aur right swipe karke band karein. Phone, tablet aur iPhone par same tarah kaam karta hai.
welcome.tips.t3Body: Kisi bhi section par heart tap karein. Stats, koi drill mode, leaderboard, use pin karne ke liye. Phir aapke favourites home screen par ek tap door rehte hain.
welcome.tour.title: Andar kya kya hai, dekhein
welcome.tour.sub: Kisi bhi section par tap karke dekhein woh kya karta hai, phir shuru ho jaayein. Ise Settings se dobara khol sakte hain.
welcome.popup.sub: Shuru karne se pehle ek quick jhalak
welcome.leave.title: Tour chhod dein?
welcome.leave.body: Ise kabhi bhi Settings → Show welcome tour se dobara khol sakte hain.
welcome.rows.kmap.title: Knowledge Map
welcome.rows.kmap.desc: Aapka syllabus ek constellation ki tarah, practice karke har star jagmagaayein.
welcome.rows.drill.title: Drill Tests
welcome.rows.drill.desc: Saare 6 test modes, quick warm-ups se full exam simulation tak, ek jagah.
welcome.rows.learn.title: Topic wise seekhein
welcome.rows.learn.desc: Passive video ki jagah bite-sized concept cards.
welcome.rows.methods.title: Study Methods
welcome.rows.methods.desc: Padhne ke 6 science-backed tareeke, aur har ek ko yahan kaise use karein.
welcome.rows.revision.title: Revision Sheet
welcome.rows.revision.desc: Bookmarks ek printable page mein digest kiye huye.
welcome.rows.doubts.title: My Doubts
welcome.rows.doubts.desc: Padhte waqt jo bhi unclear lage use flag karein; sab kuch ek jagah clear karein.
welcome.rows.library.title: Question Bank Library
welcome.rows.library.desc: Shared banks browse karein aur questions import karein.
auth.createSub: Devices ke beech progress save karne ke liye profile banayein
auth.keepExploring: Guest ke roop mein explore karte rahein
auth.googleSignedPre: Google se sign in hua as
auth.googleSignedPost: : finish karne ke liye neeche ek display name chunein.
auth.recovery.identify: Apna display name daalein. Hum aapka security question dikhaayenge taaki aap prove kar sakein ki yeh aap hi hain.
auth.recovery.dob: Profile banaate waqt jo date of birth set ki thi woh daalein, phir naya password chunein.
auth.recovery.question: Apne security question ka jawab dein, phir naya password chunein.
auth.recovery.success: Password reset ho gaya. Naye password se log in karein, humne use pehle se bhar diya hai.
auth.nameTaken: Yeh naam pehle se liya ja chuka hai.
auth.emojiCaution: Emojis aur symbols leaderboard ya backups mein sahi se nahi dikh sakte. Letters, numbers aur spaces sabse safe hain.
auth.answerHelp: Password bhool jaayein to isi se recover karenge. Case-sensitive nahi hai.
auth.emailHelp: Isse aap username ya email dono se log in kar sakte hain, aur account recover karne mein bhi madad milti hai.
auth.warn.google: Aapka Google account is profile ko secure rakhta hai, alag se koi password yaad rakhne ki zaroorat nahi.
auth.warn.create: Apna display name aur password yaad rakhein. Log in ke liye dono chahiye honge. Bhool jaane par access wapas paane ka ek hi raasta hai: aapka security question.
auth.warn.login: Yeh ek study app hai, secure account nahi. Jo password aap kahin aur use karte hain woh yahan na daalein.
auth.legacy.title: Is device ka purana progress is profile mein le aayein
auth.hint.google: Profiles devices ke beech sync hoti hain. Aapka Google account aapko signed in rakhta hai, password ki zaroorat nahi.
auth.hint.create: Profiles devices ke beech sync hoti hain. Apna display name, password aur security answer yaad rakhein.
auth.hint.login: Password bhool gaye? Upar wala link use karein. Security question se reset kar sakte hain.
auth.link.title: Aapki profile mil gayi
auth.link.body1: pehle se is profile par hai
auth.link.body2: Google connect karne ke liye us profile ka password ek baar daalein, uske baad ek tap mein sign in ho jaayega.
auth.err.notStaff: Yeh Google account kisi staff account se linked nahi hai. Apne username & password se sign in karein, ya pehle main app se Google link karein.
auth.err.linkFailed: Aapka Google account link nahi ho paaya
auth.err.noRecoverable: Is naam se koi recoverable profile nahi mili. Spelling check karein, ya nayi profile banayein.
auth.err.recoveryUnreachable: Recovery service tak nahi pahunch paaye
auth.err.typeAnswer: Apne security question ka jawab likhein
auth.err.profanity: Is display name mein aisa shabd hai jo hum publicly nahi dikha sakte, koi aur chunein.
settings.guest.tip: Abhi aap guest hain, aapka progress sirf isi device par hai. Free profile banakar use backup karein aur phones ke beech sync karein.
settings.guest.sub: Aap guest hain: progress save karein & devices ke beech sync karein
settings.profile.rowTip: Apna naam badlein, is device par doosri profile par switch karein, apna data backup karein, ya yeh profile reset karein, sab ek hi page par.
settings.profile.tapToRename: Rename ke liye tap karein · devices ke beech sync hota hai
settings.profile.loggedIn: Logged in · devices ke beech sync hota hai
settings.profile.syncedBody: Aapka progress aapke account mein saved hai. Naye phone ya laptop par bas usi naam & password se sign in karein, sab kuch apne aap restore ho jaayega.
settings.switch.confirmBody: Aap doosri profile par chale jaayenge. Aapka current progress saved hai.
settings.logout.confirmTitle: Is profile se log out karein?
settings.logout.confirmBody: Aapka progress saved hai aur aap kabhi bhi dobara log in kar sakte hain. Kuch bhi delete nahi hota.
settings.logout.sub: Is device par session khatam karein
settings.reset.confirmTitle: Is profile ka data reset karein?
settings.reset.confirmBody: Yeh sirf is profile ka progress, bookmarks, stats aur custom questions permanently delete kar deta hai. Baaki profiles par asar nahi hota. Ise undo nahi kiya ja sakta, pehle backup download karne ki sochein (Settings → Backup).
settings.reset.rowTitle: Is profile ka data reset karein
settings.reset.rowSub: Progress, bookmarks, stats & custom questions permanently delete ho jaayenge
settings.gestures.intro: Chunein ki sidebar kaise khule aur band ho. Backdrop tap karke band karna hamesha on rehta hai.
settings.gestures.closeOn: Sidebar khula ho to kahin bhi right swipe karke use band karein
settings.gestures.closeOff: Off: backdrop ya menu icon tap karke ab bhi band kar sakte hain
settings.gestures.openSub: Home screen par kahin bhi left swipe karke sidebar kholein, phone, tablet aur iOS.
settings.gestures.backdropSub: Hamesha on: disable nahi ho sakta
settings.gestures.rowSub: Swipe karke sidebar kholein ya band karein
settings.gestures.rowTip: Chunein ki sidebar kaise khule aur band ho, Home par kahin bhi left swipe karke kholein, right swipe karke band karein. Backdrop tap karne se hamesha band hota hai.
settings.sync.signInCta: Cloud backup on karne ke liye sign in karein
settings.sync.backUpNowSub: Apna latest progress abhi cloud par bhejein
settings.sync.msgOk: Abhi abhi cloud par backup ho gaya.
settings.sync.msgOffline: Abhi cloud tak nahi pahunch paaye. Aapka progress is device par safe hai aur online aate hi apne aap backup ho jaayega.
settings.sync.msgFailed: Backup nahi ho paaya, apna connection check karke dobara try karein.
settings.sync.footer: Backup automatic hai: aap jo bhi karte hain woh apne aap cloud mein save hota hai, aapke Knowledge-Map notes bhi. Download karne ya khone ke liye koi file nahi. Naye phone par jaane ke liye bas app install karein aur sign in karein.
settings.sync.rowSubGuest: Cloud par backup ke liye sign in karein
settings.sync.rowSub: Aapka progress apne aap backup hota hai
settings.sync.rowTip: Apna cloud-backup status dekhein aur jab chahein backup karein. Aapka progress: Knowledge-Map notes samet, apne aap sync hota hai aur kisi bhi device par sign in karte hi restore ho jaata hai. Koi file download nahi karni.
settings.share.title: NurseHolic share karein
settings.share.tip: Aapka personal invite, link, QR aur ek one-tap WhatsApp message. Jo dost iske through join karte hain woh aapke leaderboard par dikhte hain.
settings.share.sub: Aapka personal invite link, QR code & WhatsApp share
settings.spaced.tip: Long-term memory ke liye spaced repetition sabse bada lever hai. Yeh Home par 'Review due' card exactly tab dikhaata hai jab kisi topic ko dobara pass ki zaroorat hoti hai.
settings.spaced.title: Spaced revision reminders
settings.spaced.on: Jab questions review ke liye ready hon to Home par green 'Review due' card dikhaayein
settings.spaced.off: Hidden: spaced-repetition engine dates track karta rahega, bas aapko nudge nahi karega
settings.notif.tip: Sab kuch ek switch mein: agar aapne apne chune huye time tak padhaai nahi ki to ek halka daily nudge, plus naye question sets aane par ek ping. Dono neeche fine-tune karein.
settings.notif.iosIntro: iPhones sirf installed apps ki notifications allow karte hain. Pehle install karein: bas das second lagte hain:
settings.notif.iosStep2Post: , app kholein, aur yeh switch on karein
settings.notif.offSub: Ek tap: daily study nudge + naye questions aane par ping
settings.notif.nudgeTimeSub: Sirf tab bajta hai jab aapne us waqt tak padhaai na ki ho
settings.notif.contentOn: Team ke naya question set add karne par ek ping
settings.notif.contentOff: Off: naye question sets ki koi ping nahi
settings.notif.blocked: Is app ke liye notifications blocked hain. On karne ke liye apni browser settings mein is site ki notifications allow karein, phir dobara try karein.
settings.notif.unsupported: Yeh browser notifications support nahi karta. App ko home screen par install karke try karein.
settings.install.title: App install karein
settings.install.sub: Full screen, offline chalta hai, home screen se ek tap door
settings.gk.tipTitle: Stats mein kya count hota hai
settings.gk.tip: GK aur Aptitude NORCET nursing core ka hissa nahi hain, isliye default mein yeh aapki accuracy aur weak areas se bahar rehte hain. Sirf tab on karein jab aap inhe jaan boojh kar drill karte hon.
settings.gk.title: GK & Aptitude ko stats mein count karein
settings.gk.on: General Knowledge aur Reasoning & Aptitude aapki accuracy, coverage aur weak areas mein count hote hain
settings.gk.off: Off: sirf nursing topics accuracy, coverage aur weak areas mein count hote hain (recommended)
settings.sound.title: Pull-to-refresh sound
settings.sound.tip: Pull down karke refresh karne par ek halki confirmation sound. Bas cosmetic hai: silent refresh chahiye to off kar dein.
settings.sound.on: Pull down karke refresh karne par ek halki sound bajti hai
settings.themes.title: Themes
settings.themes.tip: Light aur dark ke beech switch karein, aur poore app ke liye accent colour palette chunein.
settings.help.tourSub: Har mode kya karta hai uska quick recap
settings.fav.title: Favourites
settings.fav.onLead: On: heart icons poore app mein dikh rahe hain.
settings.fav.onEmpty: Kuch sections ko heart karke apni home screen par pin karein.
settings.fav.onCountOne: Aapki home screen ke top par 1 favourite.
settings.fav.onCountMany: Aapki home screen ke top par {n} favourites.
settings.fav.off: Off: heart icons har jagah hidden hain. Inhe dikhane aur apne favourite sections ko home par pin karne ke liye on karein.
settings.fav.manageSub: Apni one-stop list mein sections add karein
settings.fav.orderSub: Home par dikhne ka order badlein
settings.crib.title: Tests ke baad Crib Sheet dikhaayein
settings.crib.on: Har test ke baad correct, wrong aur missed questions review karein
settings.crib.off: Crib Sheet hidden hai, tests ke baad sirf results screen
settings.crib.footer: Crib Sheet har question correct answers aur explanations ke saath dikhaata hai. PYQ booklet ki tarah. Ise share bhi kar sakte hain.
settings.legal.privacySub: Hum kya store karte hain aur woh kaise use hota hai
settings.legal.guidelinesSub: Hum FAQ threads aur leaderboard ko friendly kaise rakhte hain
settings.legal.refundsSub: Paid plans kaise kaam karenge (aaj sab kuch free hai)
settings.legal.disclaimerSub: Hamara content kya hai, kya nahi hai, aur galtiyan kaise theek hoti hain
settings.legal.rowTip: Privacy Policy aur Terms of Use padhein. Kya store hota hai, kaise use hota hai, aur app ke simple rules.
settings.legal.rowSub: Privacy Policy aur Terms of Use
settings.support.title: NurseHolic ko free rakhein
settings.support.sub: Free aur ad-free · server costs mein madad ke liye mujhe ek chai pila dein
settings.language.title: Language
settings.language.rowTip: Buttons, menus aur instructions ki language badlein. Questions aur study content English mein hi rahenge, bilkul asli NORCET exam ki tarah.
settings.language.subtitle: Yeh app ke buttons, menus aur instructions ki language badalta hai. Questions, explanations aur study content jaan boojh kar English mein rehte hain: NORCET English mein hota hai, isliye aap exam ki apni language mein hi practice karte hain.
settings.language.storageWarning: Aapke device ki storage lagbhag full hai. Jab tak aap thodi jagah khaali nahi karte, yeh language offline available nahi reh sakti.
settings.language.downloadFailed: Yeh language download nahi ho paayi. Apna connection check karke dobara try karein.
settings.language.draftNotice: Translations abhi shuruaati drafts hain aur feedback se behtar hoti hain. Agar koi line aapki bhasha mein galat lage, Report button se humein batayein.
auth.consent.ack: Main samajhta/samajhti hoon ki NurseHolic exam prep ka ek educational study tool hai, clinical guidance ka source nahi, aur main agree karta/karti hoon:
auth.consent.nudge: Profile banane ke liye upar wala box tick karein.
welcome.consentPre: Continue karne par aap agree karte hain hamari
welcome.consentEdu: NurseHolic exam prep ka study tool hai, clinical guidance nahi.
home.legalUpdated.title: Hamari terms update hui hain
home.legalUpdated.body: Humne apne legal pages refresh kiye hain. Ek nazar daal lein.
common.eduTag: Sirf educational use ke liye. Clinical decisions ke liye nahi.
nav.drawer.assistant.label: Apne saathi se pucho
nav.drawer.assistant.sub: App kaise chalta hai, chat mein pucho
nav.drawer.assistant.tip: Test, streak, sync aur har feature ke jawab turant chat mein.
